item.title: E-scooter hire ditched in Hobart over safety and behavioural concerns
item.description: The hire service has been banned after more than 37 deaths nationwide already this decade.

item.title: Traffic fines issued by an AI-camera dismissed in WA
item.description: More than $1 million in fines were wiped out due to the AI-powered camera.

item.title: Moana Pasifika ‘tragedy’ inspires ex-Wallabies captain to consider NRL defection with PNG Chiefs
item.description: The 110-Test great is plotting a move ‘home’ for a cause close to his heart.

item.title: Health Minister Mark Butler reveals NDIS overhaul and how federal government will rein in growth
item.description: Mark Butler will target the scheme’s out-of-control growth while admitting Australians need ‘more ID to get into a licensed club than to be an NDIS provider’.

item.title: Deadloch and Offspring actress Alicia Gardiner accused of ‘breaking the girl code’ in alleged assault
item.description: The actor has fronted a Melbourne court, charged over grabbing a security guard in a compromising spot.

item.title: Denise Richards and daughter Lola Sheen lead fresh tributes to Patrick Muldoon after ‘sudden’ death
item.description: Patrick Muldoon’s family said he was ‘suddenly taken from this Earth’ aged 57.

item.title: NBA superstar Victor Wembanyama suffers concussion in San Antonio’s shock playoffs loss to Portland
item.description: Victor Wembanyama laid on the floor for around 30 seconds before attempting to stagger to his feet.

item.title: Melbourne researchers develop world-first plastic that kills viruses on contact
item.description: The plastic could protect everything from mobile phones to hospital surfaces.

item.title: Chelsea sack manager Liam Rosenior amid worst goalscoring drought in over a century
item.description: The famous club has issued a statement just a day after another humiliating loss.

item.title: What Level 3 in Australia’s National Fuel Security Plan actually means, and how it could affect you
item.description: ‘We’ve got to prepare for the possibility that this will get worse before it gets better.’

item.title: NSW Premier Chris Minns responds to Australians reportedly fuming over Anzac Day public holiday
item.description: The NSW premier has labelled the extra day off a ‘common sense change’ as other leaders face pressure to follow suit.

item.title: Oscar Piastri weighs in on F1 rival Max Verstappen’s situation: ‘Not a great look’
item.description: The Aussie says it will be a ‘big loss’ if the champion walks away from the sport.

item.title: Teen charged with killing Florida stepsister on cruise ship pleads not guilty
item.description: The 16-year-old is accused of murder and aggravated sexual assault.

item.title: John Mountain: Perth chef who clashed with Tash Peterson apologises after ‘stupid’ gang rape joke sparks fury
item.description: A popular chef and restaurant owner in Perth’s northern suburbs is under fire after using the term ‘gang rape’ in a social media post to describe a busy night at the venue.

item.title: Why we pause at dawn: The meaning and origins behind our Anzac Day traditions
item.description: On April 25, communities take part in traditions that have become deeply embedded in Australian life. Here’s why.

item.title: Aussie Olympic legend Ariarne Titmus to boost Seven’s live and free Commonwealth Games coverage
item.description: The swimming great is thrilled she’ll no longer be the ‘worst looking person’ at the pool.

item.title: NSW father’s heartbreaking tribute after Meaghan Bowler, 32, allegedly murdered by husband in US
item.description: ‘She was just a beautiful, ambitious, kind, and trusting girl.’

item.title: Robert Irwin reveals ‘exciting’ new gig on US TV following Dancing With The Stars victory
item.description: The wildlife warrior hasn’t turned his back on the ballroom just yet.

item.title: Townsville mum loses fallopian tube after alleged hospital neglect
item.description: After being sent home four times, she says a missed diagnosis turned into a life-altering emergency.

item.title: Meta and Microsoft slash thousands of jobs amid rise of artificial intelligence
item.description: The company says the cuts are for the sake of efficiency and to allow new investments in parts of its business.

item.title: Bizarre moment driver flees after apparent ‘ram raid’ on Supercars team Triple Eight Race Engineering’s Banyo HQ
item.description: CCTV footage showed the man’s ‘unbelievable’ effort to crash into the building - before his escape left a legend baffled.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: When Anthony Albanese plans to step down as Prime Minister as he warns of tough budget ahead
item.description: ‘Then I’ll know it is time to watch the footy every Saturday rather than do this job.’

item.title: Melbourne's 'butterfly boy' born with Epidermolysis Bullosa takes first steps after groundbreaking treatment
item.description: The four-year-old boy born with a rare genetic condition couldn't walk just months ago.

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz pulls out of French Open in ‘painful’ blow for tennis
item.description: The superstar has issued a statement, saying it is ‘a difficult time for me’.

item.title: Aussie tennis star Alex de Minaur ‘embarrassed’ by rising teenager Rafael Jodar at Madrid Open
item.description: ‘He looked lost out there.’

item.title: ‘I will always be part of the royal family,’ Prince Harry said during whirlwind tour
item.description: Prince Harry says during a visit to Ukraine he is ‘doing the very thing that I was born to do’.

item.title: Former New Zealand cricketer Doug Bracewell banned for two years after failing ‘in-competition’ drugs test
item.description: ‘We are committed to supporting him through rehabilitation.’

item.title: Rob and Michelle Reiner's son Jake pens tribute after parents' murder as younger brother Nick charged
item.description: ‘My world, as I knew it, had collapsed.’

item.title: Mounjaro, diabetes and weight loss drug, won't be listed on PBS after negotiations collapse
item.description: Around 450,000 Australians will continue paying hundreds of dollars a month for their medication.

item.title: Victorian motorists to pocket 20 per cent rebate on car registration to ease pain at the pump
item.description: Drivers in one state will receive the rebate to ease cost-of-living pressure as fuel prices soar across the country.

item.title: Pat Cummins cops rude welcome back to cricket from 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
item.description: The Australian got the last laugh over his ‘new favourite player’ in his first match since the Ashes.

item.title: Grand slam champion Iga Swiatek reduced to tears as ‘sad’ health battle forces Madrid Open retirement
item.description: ‘There is something going on’ and it’s taken down a key player just weeks out from the French Open.

item.title: Capital gains tax discount could face biggest shake-up since 1999 - what could it mean for investors and home buyers?
item.description: Find out who stands to gain and who misses out under the proposed changes at budget time.

item.title: Australian surgeon explains the new ‘zombie filler’ trend using cadaver fat for cosmetic injections
item.description: An expert weighs in on whether the new beauty procedure is worth it.

item.title: Ronan Androgenic: Brisbane looksmaxxing influencer arrested during livestream
item.description: Ronan Androgenic has become a rising star among a generation increasingly obsessed with extreme beauty improvement.

item.title: Sam Neill reveals cancer battle and fight for life-saving treatment access
item.description: The Jurassic Park star is on a mission to help Australians access the treatment that gave him a second chance.

item.title: New washing machines to feature dual start function for child safety
item.description: The change follows a fatal accident in New Zealand in 2021.

item.title: Seasonal depression: The yearly blues hitting Australians as the temperature cools
item.description: Thousands of Australians are impacted as the mercury drops every year.

item.description: Guests were picking at salads when it became apparent the night had taken a turn.

item.description: ‘Sam deserves what’s happening to her.’

item.description: ‘Maddie and I have drawn enormous strength from how so very loved she was and is.’

item.title: Magda Szubanski unwittingly becomes face of online health scam amid cancer remission
item.description: ‘She’s being used just like me.’

item.description: ‘It’s very intimidating and can feel really scary.’

item.description: ‘As a mother, you put everybody else in front of yourself ... Don’t dismiss even the smallest symptoms.’

item.description: The drones hit residential neighbourhoods and civilian infrastructure in a key Black Sea port city.

item.description: The pair first sparked engagement speculation after Kravitz was spotted wearing a huge diamond ring on her wedding finger.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: King Charles’ speech to US lawmakers addresses war on the 250th independence anniversary
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Melbourne NRL star Tui Kamikamica’s heartwarming health update after terrifying stroke
item.description: The 31-year-old needed emergency brain surgery and had one more operation last week to avoid a ‘scary’ future.

item.title: Jarome Luai answers burning tax-free question as PNG Chiefs contract confirmed
item.description: The superstar has fronted up after contract clauses allowed him to swap Wests Tigers for the Chiefs.

item.title: US to issue passports featuring Donald Trump’s picture to commemorate America’s 250th anniversary
item.description: Trump’s face and his signature in gold will appear on the inside cover.

item.title: Worker killed after being crushed loading stock at worksite near Toowoomba
item.description: Staff were moving stock when the fatal incident happened.

item.title: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson brags about ‘amazing’ new private plane and millions in donations
item.description: ‘I cannot thank you enough for the hope and encouragement.’

item.title: Shocking footage shows fireball as arsonist allegedly sets fire to two Pilates studios on NSW Central Coast
item.description: A man armed with a jerry can and hammer is seen lighting the blaze, as police appeal for information.

item.title: Melbourne Demons confirm Dan Taylor as new CEO a day after axing of Paul Guerra
item.description: The club have turned to another leader from outside the football world.

item.title: Toyota posts global sales record amid US tariffs, Chinese competition
item.description: The Japanese automotive giant has set a new global sales record despite tariff uncertainty and growing competition from Chinese brands.

item.title: G8 Education reveals full list of 40 childcare centres to be closed down
item.description: Parents across the country have been caught off guard and staff facing an uncertain future.

item.title: Volkswagen Golf, Tiguan and Tayron recalled again
item.description: A second recall within a week affects newer versions of all three VWs, with a software issue potentially leading to power steering failure.

item.title: Police allege suspected Hells Angels member lied about serving as an ADF soldier
item.description: The 41-year-old was bailed but remains before the courts.

item.title: GWM Tank 400: Aggressively styled off-road SUV a chance for Australia with PHEV power
item.description: GWM could plug a tiny gap in its Australian lineup with a large plug-in hybrid SUV offering a long electric driving range.

item.title: The Agenda Setters stocks after R7: Buy, hold and sell
item.description: ‘That is not what they brought.’

item.title: Renault Megane RS recalled
item.description: Renault is recalling some examples of its Megane RS hot hatch due to a potential engine sensor defect.

item.title: Western Bulldogs midfielder Tom Liberatore’s immediate future up in the air as concussion symptoms linger
item.description: Uncertainty continues to cloud the 33-year-old’s season and career.

item.title: Luke Beveridge takes aim at AFL’s constant rule changes in three-minute rant about state of the game
item.description: The coach likened the AFL to a ‘punching bag’ and called for an independent review to fix everything.

item.title: Person in ‘critical condition’ after Mustard Seed restaurant destroyed by suspicious fire
item.description: The building was fully engulfed when emergency services arrived.

item.title: Ultramarathon swimmer Andy Donaldson claims new world record during 55km swim in WA’s remote Kimberley region
item.description: ‘The mind always gives up before the body does.’

item.title: Would you eat this? Woolworths shoppers divided over marked-down pack of grey-toned mince
item.description: From ‘already rotten’ to ‘still safe to eat’, the off-colour mince has sparked a beef online.

item.title: Socceroos star Jackson Irvine slams FIFA giving inaugural peace prize to President Trump: ‘Mockery’
item.description: ‘Decisions like that feel like they just set us back.’

item.title: 2026 Chery Tiggo V revealed as a new seven-seat SUV that converts into a ute
item.description: The all-new Tiggo V blends traditional large SUV practicality with ute-like flexibility, and it could be heading to Australia.

item.title: Injury-cursed Fremantle star Aine Tighe ruled out for 2026 AFLW season as knee concern lingers
item.description: ‘This decision gives her the best opportunity to prioritise her long-term health.’

item.title: Beau Lamarre-Condon’s mother Coleen accused of perverting the course of justice in double murder trial
item.description: Up to 300 witnesses are expected to take the stand over the alleged double shooting.

item.title: Parafield crash: Two dead, several rushed to hospital after light plane smashes into hangar at Adelaide airport
item.description: Emergency crews remain on the scene to determine what caused the accident.

item.title: India overtakes England as Australia’s biggest source of overseas born migrants, ABS figures show
item.description: For the first time since Australia became a nation in 1901, the English are no longer the most common foreigners.

item.title: Woman charged with additional serious assault offence after alleged pram attack in Maryborough, Queensland
item.description: The alleged victim, a 77-year-old woman, suffered a sprained wrist.

item.title: Fremantle midfielder Nathan O’Driscoll reveals battle with anxiety
item.description: ‘Deep depressive states’ have sent Nathan O’Driscoll to the brink ‘three separate times’.

item.title: Major system failure as Victorian domestic violence victims are being stalked by attackers from behind bars
item.description: Despite her ex-partner being jailed, Natasha was still receiving phone calls and love letters from him.

item.title: Man charged after alleged tiny home theft stopped by ‘hero’ locals in citizen’s arrest in Bli Bli, Sunshine Coast
item.description: Two men trained in martial arts stepped in until police arrived.

item.title: Nick Riewoldt hits back after copping ‘lazy’ stray from Brad Scott over Ben McKay assessment
item.description: ‘Is it lazy though? I don’t think I’ve ever been accused of being lazy.’

item.title: Work from home jobs surge according to Seek data as Australians embrace flexible working arrangements
item.description: A growing number of job advertisements are now promoting their flexible working options.

item.title: New advice on catch-up moves to start building wealth in your 40s, 50s and beyond
item.description: ‘It’s never too late.’

item.title: Four minutes of daily movement could help prevent type 2 diabetes, study finds
item.description: A new study reveals the surprisingly simple daily habit that could slash your risk of type 2 diabetes by more than a third.

item.title: Prince and Princess of Wales William and Kate share family photo to mark 15th wedding anniversary
item.description: The Prince and Princess of Wales have marked their 15th wedding anniversary.

item.title: Ripper GC general manager Nick Adams debunks ‘panic’ myth surrounding future of LIV Golf
item.description: ‘That’s the only information I have at this stage.’

item.title: King and a joker: Charles disarms US hosts with quips at state dinner in Washington
item.description: ‘King George never set foot in America and, please rest assured, I am not here as part of some cunning rearguard action.’

item.title: Man arrested after two stabbed in London Jewish area Golders Green
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said ‘attacks on our Jewish community are attacks on Britain’.
